nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 69%, PFR 20%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 27/40 times (68%). River aggression shows up in 4/200 hands (2%). Villain has won 59 of 73 showdowns.

nodes.title: Frequent preflop 3-bettor
nodes.body: Villain has 3-bet preflop in 5 completed hands.

nodes.title: Folds to flop c-bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero flop c-bet 27 times across 40 c-bet opportunities.

nodes.title: Folds to river bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero river bets 10 times across 13 river bet opportunities.

nodes.title: River aggressor
nodes.body: Villain has bet or raised the river in 4 completed hands.

nodes.title: Strong showdown caller
nodes.body: Villain has won 59 of 73 showdowns (81%). When villain calls to showdown their range is strong — bluffing at showdown is likely -EV.
